query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man with light-colored hair and a short beard stands in the foreground wearing a dark hooded sweatshirt. Behind him, strings of star-shaped lights and bright white signage illuminate a red-toned nighttime scene, suggesting an amusement park or carnival environment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man with light-colored hair and a short beard appears in a tilted, close-up composition wearing a dark hooded sweatshirt, his skin taking on an unnatural greenish-cyan sickly cast. Motion-blurred streaks of white and blue light scatter into star-shaped bokeh across the saturated red background, while chromatic aberration creates color fringing along the edges of the subject. The aggressive clash between red and cyan tones, combined with the unconventional framing and blurred light trails, generates a raw, unsettling energy in this nighttime carnival scene.
